hooks.prompt: If the file being created is a route, controller, or endpoint handler: (1) Ensure all routes are nested under a versioned path prefix such as /api/v1/. (2) Ensure every endpoint returns errors in Contoso's standard error format: { "error": { "code": "...", "message": "...", "details": [...] } }. (3) Ensure proper HTTP status codes are used for each operation. (4) Ensure request validation is implemented for all input parameters and request bodies. (5) Include HATEOAS _links in resource responses.
